words.definition: A set of instructions for preparing a particular dish
words.example: This is my grandmother's secret recipe for apple pie.

words.definition: One of the foods or substances used to make a dish
words.example: You only need a few fresh ingredients to make this meal.

words.definition: To heat a liquid until it produces large bubbles at 100°C
words.example: Boil the pasta for ten minutes until it is al dente.

words.definition: To mix ingredients smoothly, often in a blender
words.example: Blend the fruits together to make a thick smoothie.

words.definition: To heat an oven to the required temperature before cooking begins
words.example: Preheat the oven to 180°C before putting in the cake.

words.definition: To beat eggs, cream, or a sauce quickly to add air and make it light
words.example: Whisk the eggs until they are light and fluffy.

words.definition: To cut food into small, evenly sized cube-shaped pieces
words.example: Dice the onion and garlic finely before adding them to the pan.

words.definition: To soak food in a seasoned liquid before cooking to add flavour
words.example: Marinate the chicken in lemon juice and herbs for two hours.

words.definition: To shred food into small thin pieces by rubbing it against a grater
words.example: Grate the cheese over the pasta just before serving.

words.definition: A liquid mixture of flour, eggs, and milk used for coating or baking
words.example: Dip the fish pieces in the batter before frying them.

words.definition: A tool or implement used for cooking or eating
words.example: Make sure all cooking utensils are clean before you start.

words.definition: To cook food gently in liquid just below boiling point
words.example: Let the soup simmer on low heat for about twenty minutes.

words.definition: To fry food quickly in a little oil or butter over high heat
words.example: Sauté the mushrooms in butter for about two minutes.

words.definition: To work dough firmly with your hands by pushing and folding
words.example: Knead the bread dough for ten minutes until it is smooth and elastic.

words.definition: To cook food directly under intense overhead heat in an oven
words.example: Broil the fish fillets for about five minutes on each side.
